Maqbool Hussain, a Pakistani soldier injured and captured by the Indian Army during the 1965 war.

He sent 40 years in Indian jails before being released as a civilian prisoner in 2005.

He was born in 1940.

He was died on August 28, 2018.

questions.title: Wazir Mansion is the birth place of which person?
questions.explanation:
Wazir Mansion is the birth place of Quaid-i-Azam.

It was built during 1860 to 1870 with stone masonry, lime and jute.

It is located in the area of Kharadar, Karachi.

questions.title: Who among the following is known as Falcon of Andalus?
questions.explanation:
Abd al-Rahman I was the founder and first emir of the Emirate of Córdoba, ruling from 756 to 788.

He established the Umayyad dynasty in al-Andalus.

questions.title: When did Musharraf take the oath of President of Pakistan?
questions.explanation: Musharraf took the oath of President on June 20, 2001, just a month before the Agra Summit in July 2001.

questions.title: What is the other name of Mohammad Ali Bogra Formula?
questions.explanation:
Constitutional Formulathe another name of Mohammad Ali Bogra Formula

The Bogra Formula was a political compromise presented and proposed by Prime Minister Bogra on 7 October 1953

The Bogra Formula sought to permanently abolish the Governor-General and to be replaced with the elected figurehead presidency.

Mohammad Ali Bogra was the 2nd Bengali to serve as Prime Minister of Pakistan.

Sahibzada Mohammad Ali Bogra was the 3rd Prime Minister of Pakistan from 17 April 1953 till 12 August 1955.

He was the 3rd & 7th Minister of Foreign Affairs from 13 June 1962 till 23 January 1963

Bogra was Minister of Defence from 17 April 1953 to 24 October 1954.
